title: Cirrus: Skip OSX CI on release-branches
body:
This task does not make sense to maintain long-term on release
branches.  Its intent is always/only to test the latest/greatest code
and environment.  After release, it's simply too difficult to maintain
functioning CI with a constantly changing (Cirrus-managed) OSX environment.
Ensure the task only runs for PRs targeted at the default branch, or if
the current branch is the default branch.

See also:
* https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1851
* https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1852

comments.body: ***Note:*** The 'cross' task is getting pulled in to the skip-on-release because of a YAML-alias.  I can remove that if you think maintaining cross-compile-ability on release branches is important (I don't have a strong opinion and only a weak argument).
Force-push: Restored the cross task to run as it did previously (including on release-branches).  Updated commit and PR description accordingly.
oof more yaml problems...time to actually get my pre-commit setup properly on this repo...
